'''Gungan Transport Ships''' were aquatic vessels used by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] to ferry troops and equipment around the battlefield. They were unarmed wedge-shaped vessels with two bubble-like [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpits]], and were driven by two propellers. The [[Transport/Legends|transports]] could carry up to 15 individuals in the rearward bulge at a cost of 125 units of [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]] and 15 units of [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]]. They were produced at [[Shipyard (water)|shipyards]] by the [[Bongomeken Collective]] around [[3000 BBY]] during the [[War of the Gungan tribes]]. Over three-thousand [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, two transport ships [[Battle of the Sacred Place|escorted]] [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] and other survivors from the [[Siege of Otoh Gunga|Naboo Swamp Battle]] to the [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungan Sacred Place]].

==Behind the scenes==
Gungan Transport Ships appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]]. They are the Gungan aquatic transport units.
